parameters.apprise_url_plus: sparkpost://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own SparkPost Email destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise sparkpost:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a SparkPost transmissions API JSON body and post it to api.sparkpost.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment SparkPost destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to SparkPost transmissions API (no Apprise)

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SparkPost Email apikey

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SparkPost Email host

user_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's SparkPost Email user
